{%- extends "basic/layout.html" %} {#- The landing page has no heading title; show just the site name in the tab, instead of the first section heading. -#} {%- block htmltitle %} {%- if pagename == root_doc %} {{ docstitle|e }} {%- else %} {{ super() }} {%- endif %} {%- endblock %} {#- Set the theme before first paint to avoid a flash. -#} {%- block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- endblock %} {#- Compact sticky top bar replaces the relbars. -#} {%- block header %}
{%- if logo_url %}{%- endif %} {{ project|e }}
GitHub PyPI
{%- endblock %} {#- Tag the landing page so its sections can be separated with dividers. -#} {%- block body_tag %}{% endblock %} {%- block relbar1 %}{%- endblock %} {%- block relbar2 %}{%- endblock %} {#- The top bar already shows the logo; drop the basic theme's sidebar logo. -#} {%- block sidebarlogo %}{%- endblock %} {%- block footer %} {{ super() }} {%- endblock %}
